title: Mending Rework
description: Repair items in anvils for 0 experience levels.
body:
![Mending Rework Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4622346ec78113b6015b7fa416409e0c4d2dcb72.png) ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5561b20068649ed08f92d8454cb43ee7a036d34_0.webp) ### **SUMMARY:** **MENDING REWORK** revamps the mending enchant and durability as a whole, making anvil repairing less punishing so that a mending villager isn't a requirement in every world.

The fabric version of this mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/project/P7dR8mSH). ![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5561b20068649ed08f92d8454cb43ee7a036d34_0.webp) ### **FEATURE LIST:** - **Repairing items in anvils** costs 0 experience. - Does not increase future combine costs. - Items are repairable even if combining the item with another is too expensive. - Default chance of an anvil taking damage reduced to 6% (from 12%).

- **Mending enchant** no longer repairs items when you pickup experience. - Items with mending regain 10% more durability when repaired. - Items with mending never damage an anvil when renaming or repairing.

- **Unbreaking enchant** now works the same on armor as it does on tools. - Vanilla unbreaking 3 increases a tool's lifespan by 300% but only increases armor's lifespan by 43%. - With this mod, armor enchanted with unbreaking will last significantly longer. - This change was made because armor breaks very fast without vanilla mending.

- **Netherite items** are not repaired with netherite ingots. - Netherite items are repairable with diamonds or netherite scraps. - This change gives diamonds a permanent use in the endgame.

- **Vanilla items** without repair materials were given one: - Tridents are repaired with diamonds. - Crossbows and shears are repaired with iron ingots. - Bows and fishing rods are repaired with string. - Brushes are repaired with feathers. - Flint and steel is repaired with flint.

- **Default repair material** (Bottle O' Enchanting) is given to every item this mod detects that is compatible with mending and doesn't already have a repair material.

- **JEI Integration** in version 0.4+ displays anvil repair recipes for all items, vanilla or modded.
